case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS OLASCOAGA SALVADOR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLASCOAGA SALVADOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $915.10 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT OLASCOAGA SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
